description.value:
Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You would become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Fatigued], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Immobilized], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Paralyzed], slowed, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Suppressed].

You refuse to stop moving, pushing yourself beyond effects that would stop most creatures. You delay the effects of the triggering condition until the end of your next turn. Each time you use a move action while the condition is being delayed, you continue to delay the condition an additional round, up to 6 rounds. If the condition has a duration, the duration begins to elapse only after the delay. You can't further delay or prevent the condition after this ability ends.
